info.name: AI Media Generate App API
info.description:
Postman collection for manual testing of the AI Media Generate Cloudflare Workers backend.

**Auth model:**
- Mobile routes use `Authorization: Bearer {session_token}` obtained from the bootstrap endpoint.
- Admin routes use `X-Admin-Key: {ADMIN_API_KEY}` shared secret.
- Internal routes have no built-in auth (secured at the network level).
- The RevenueCat webhook uses `Authorization: Bearer {REVENUECAT_WEBHOOK_SECRET}`.

Run `Mobile / Auth / Bootstrap Anonymous Auth` first, then copy the returned `session_token` into the `authToken` environment variable (the test script does this automatically).

item.name: Health
item.description: Public service health and version checks. No authentication required.

request.description:
GET `/api/health`. Public health probe.

Expected response: `{ success: true, data: { status: "ok", timestamp } }`.

GET `/api/version`. Public version and environment info.

Expected response: `{ success: true, data: { version, environment } }`.

item.name: Mobile / Auth
item.description: Anonymous auth bootstrap and session management. The bootstrap endpoint is the first call on app launch — it creates an anonymous user and returns a session token used for all subsequent mobile requests.

request.description:
POST `/api/mobile/auth/bootstrap`. Public endpoint — no auth required.

Creates an anonymous user and returns a session token. The test script automatically sets `authToken` and `userId` environment variables.

Required fields: `installation_id`, `platform` (ios|android), `app_version`.
Optional fields: `device_identifier`, `device_model`, `os_version`.

GET `/api/mobile/auth/me`. Returns the authenticated user's basic info.

Requires `Authorization: Bearer {token}`.

Expected response: `{ success: true, data: { id, is_anonymous, created_at } }`.

POST `/api/mobile/auth/logout`. Revokes the current session token.

After logout, the `authToken` is no longer valid. Run Bootstrap again to get a new one.

item.name: Mobile / Filters
item.description: Mobile-safe active filter catalog. These routes are currently public (no auth required).

request.description:
GET `/api/mobile/filters`. Lists active filters only.

Query params: `page` (default 1), `pageSize` (default 20, max 100).

The test script auto-sets `filterId` and `filterSlug` from the first result.

GET `/api/mobile/filters/:slug`. Returns a single filter by slug.

Uses `filterSlug` set by List Active Filters or Admin Create Filter.

item.name: Mobile / Uploads
item.description:
Authenticated mobile upload flow. The backend creates an input asset and returns a presigned R2 PUT URL. The actual file upload goes directly to R2 (not the Worker).

Requires `Authorization: Bearer {token}` from bootstrap.

request.description:
POST `/api/mobile/uploads/request`. Creates a pending input asset and returns a presigned R2 PUT URL.

Validation:
- `filename`: 1–255 chars
- `mimeType`: must be one of image/jpeg, image/png, image/webp, image/heic, image/heif, video/mp4, video/quicktime, video/webm
- `fileSizeBytes`: positive integer, max 104857600 (100 MB)

The test script auto-sets `assetId`, `uploadUrl`, and `storageKey`.

item.name: Upload File to Signed R2 URL

request.description:
PUT `{{uploadUrl}}`. **This is NOT a Worker route** — it uploads the binary file directly to the presigned R2 URL returned by `Request Upload URL`.

**Manual step:** Select a local file in Postman's Body > Binary file picker before sending.

The signed URL expires after ~600 seconds. If it expires, rerun `Request Upload URL`.

POST `/api/mobile/uploads/confirm`. Marks a pending asset as `uploaded` after the direct R2 upload.

`assetId` must be a UUID owned by the authenticated user and have status `pending`.

Optional metadata: `fileSizeBytes`, `mimeType`, `width`, `height`, `durationSeconds`.

item.name: Mobile / Assets
item.description:
Authenticated mobile asset listing and detail reads. Responses include signed read URLs for readable assets.

Requires `Authorization: Bearer {token}` from bootstrap.

request.description:
GET `/api/mobile/assets`. Lists the authenticated user's assets.

Optional filters: `kind` (input|output), `media_type` (image|video), `status` (pending|uploaded|processing|ready|failed).
Pagination: `page`, `pageSize`.

query.description: pending, uploaded, processing, ready, or failed

request.description:
GET `/api/mobile/assets/:id`. Uses `assetId` from the upload request.

Returns client-safe metadata and a signed `read_url` when status is `uploaded` or `ready`.

GET `/api/mobile/assets/:id`. Uses `outputAssetId` from a completed generation.

Output assets normally have `kind=output` and `status=ready`.

item.name: Mobile / Generations
item.description:
Authenticated mobile generation submission and status reads.

Requires `Authorization: Bearer {token}` from bootstrap.

request.description:
POST `/api/mobile/generations`. Submits a new generation job.

Requires:
- `filter_id`: UUID of an active filter
- `input_asset_id`: UUID of an uploaded input asset owned by the user
- `params` (optional): provider-specific parameters

Validation: filter must be active, asset must be `uploaded` status and `input` kind, asset media type must be compatible with filter's `input_media_types`, and user must have sufficient coin balance.

GET `/api/mobile/generations/:id`. Returns the generation job detail.

If the job is completed and has an output asset, the response includes `output_asset` with a signed `read_url`.

The test script auto-sets `outputAssetId` if present.

GET `/api/mobile/generations`. Lists the authenticated user's generation jobs.

Optional status filter: `queued`, `processing`, `completed`, `failed`.
Pagination: `page`, `pageSize`.

item.name: Mobile / Billing
item.description:
Authenticated mobile billing state, coin balance, entitlements, product catalog, and RevenueCat customer registration.

Requires `Authorization: Bearer {token}` from bootstrap.

request.description:
GET `/api/mobile/billing/me`. Returns combined billing state: coin balance + subscription info.

Expected response: `{ success: true, data: { coins, subscription: { is_active, entitlement_id, product_id, expires_at } } }`.

GET `/api/mobile/billing/coins`. Returns the user's coin balance.

Expected response: `{ success: true, data: { balance } }`.

GET `/api/mobile/billing/entitlements`. Returns subscription/entitlement state.

Expected response: `{ success: true, data: { is_active, entitlement_id, product_id, expires_at, unsubscribed_at } }`.

GET `/api/mobile/billing/products`. Lists available billing products (subscriptions and coin packs).

Expected response: `{ success: true, data: [{ id, rc_product_id, type, name, coin_amount }] }`.

POST `/api/mobile/billing/customer`. Registers or updates the RevenueCat customer mapping for the authenticated user.

Required field: `rc_app_user_id` (the RevenueCat app user ID string).

item.name: Mobile / Devices
item.description: Mobile device push-token placeholders. These routes currently return 501 responses and are not yet implemented.

request.description:
POST `/api/mobile/devices/push-token`. **Placeholder** — returns 501.

Not yet implemented. Will register a push notification token.

DELETE `/api/mobile/devices/push-token`. **Placeholder** — returns 501.

Not yet implemented. Will remove a push notification token.

item.name: Admin
item.description:
**Admin-only routes.** All routes in this folder require the `X-Admin-Key` header set to the `ADMIN_API_KEY` secret.

These routes are NOT mobile-safe. Do not expose admin endpoints to client apps.

request.description:
GET `/api/admin/dashboard`. Aggregate counts for users, jobs, assets, and active filters.

**Admin auth required:** `X-Admin-Key` header.

GET `/api/admin/users`. Lists all users with pagination.

**Admin auth required.**

GET `/api/admin/users/:id`. Get a single user by ID.

**Admin auth required.** Set `adminUserId` to a real user ID from List Users.

GET `/api/admin/jobs`. Lists all generation jobs with provider-internal fields.

**Admin auth required.**

GET `/api/admin/jobs/:id`. Returns full job detail with provider-internal fields.

**Admin auth required.**

POST `/api/admin/jobs/:id/cancel`. Cancels a job in `queued` or `processing` status.

Returns 404 for terminal or missing jobs.

**Admin auth required.**

GET `/api/admin/assets`. Lists all assets with internal fields.

**Admin auth required.**

GET `/api/admin/assets/:id`. Returns internal asset fields including storage key.

**Admin auth required.**

DELETE `/api/admin/assets/:id`. Deletes the D1 row only; does not remove the R2 object.

**Admin auth required. Destructive.**

GET `/api/admin/filters`. Lists all filters including inactive, with provider-internal fields.

**Admin auth required.**

POST `/api/admin/filters`. Creates a new filter.

Required fields: `name`, `slug`, `category`, `provider_model_id`.
Optional: `description`, `thumbnail_url`, `provider_name` (default "atlas"), `prompt_template`, `default_params_json`, `config`, `input_media_types` (default "image"), `is_active` (default true), `sort_order` (default 0).

The test script auto-sets `filterId` and `filterSlug`.

**Admin auth required.**

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Postman Image Style",
  "slug": "{{filterSlug}}",
  "description": "Image-to-image test filter for local Postman runs.",
  "thumbnail_url": "https://example.com/postman-image-style.png",
  "category": "style",
  "provider_model_id": "{{atlasModelId}}",
  "provider_name": "atlas",
  "prompt_template": "Create a polished cinematic image variation while preserving the input subject.",
  "default_params_json": {
    "size": "1024x1024",
    "n": 1,
    "thinking_mode": false
  },
  "config": {
    "source": "postman"
  },
  "input_media_types": "image",
  "is_active": true,
  "sort_order": 10
}

request.description:
GET `/api/admin/filters/:id`. Returns full filter detail with provider-internal fields.

**Admin auth required.**

PATCH `/api/admin/filters/:id`. Partial update — only fields present in the body are changed.

**Admin auth required.**

DELETE `/api/admin/filters/:id`. Permanently deletes a filter.

**Admin auth required. Destructive.**

GET `/api/admin/settings`. Returns all admin settings ordered by key.

**Admin auth required.**

PUT `/api/admin/settings/:key`. Creates or updates a string-valued admin setting.

Required: `value`. Optional: `description`.

**Admin auth required.**

GET `/api/admin/settings/:key`. Returns a single setting by key.

**Admin auth required.**

DELETE `/api/admin/settings/:key`. Permanently deletes a setting.

**Admin auth required. Destructive.**

item.name: Billing
item.description:
Admin billing management: products, user billing detail, coin grants/debits, and billing events.

**All routes require `X-Admin-Key` header.**

request.description:
GET `/api/admin/billing/products`. Lists all billing products (subscriptions and coin packs).

**Admin auth required.**

POST `/api/admin/billing/products`. Creates a new billing product.

Required: `rc_product_id`, `type` (subscription|coin_pack), `name`.
Conditional: if `type=coin_pack`, `coin_amount` (positive int) is required. If `type=subscription`, `entitlement_id` is required.
Optional: `is_active` (default true).

The test script auto-sets `billingProductId`.

**Admin auth required.**

PATCH `/api/admin/billing/products/:id`. Partial update of a billing product.

**Admin auth required.**

GET `/api/admin/billing/users/:id`. Returns full billing detail for a user: customer mapping, entitlement, coin balance, and recent coin ledger.

**Admin auth required.**

POST `/api/admin/billing/users/:id/coin-grant`. Manually grants coins to a user.

Required: `amount` (positive int), `description` (1-500 chars).

Response includes new balance.

**Admin auth required.**

POST `/api/admin/billing/users/:id/coin-debit`. Manually debits coins from a user.

Required: `amount` (positive int), `description` (1-500 chars).

Response includes new balance.

**Admin auth required.**

GET `/api/admin/billing/events`. Lists recent billing events (webhook deliveries, purchase completions, etc.).

**Admin auth required.**

item.name: Internal
item.description:
**Internal service-to-service routes.** These are NOT mobile-safe and NOT public.

Intended to be secured at the network level (e.g., Cloudflare Access). Useful for manual testing and debugging generation sync flows.

request.description:
POST `/api/internal/generations/:id/sync`. **Internal-only.**

Manual sync for a single provider job. On completion, downloads the provider output, stores it in R2, creates an output asset, and returns `outputAssetId`.

POST `/api/internal/generations/sync-pending`. **Internal-only.**

Batch sync for up to 10 queued/processing jobs with provider info. The scheduled cron calls the same core sync behavior every 2 minutes.

item.name: Webhooks
item.description:
Inbound webhook endpoints. These receive server-to-server callbacks from external services.

The RevenueCat webhook uses `Authorization: Bearer {secret}` for authentication — set `revenuecatWebhookSecret` to the same value configured as `REVENUECAT_WEBHOOK_SECRET` in your Worker secrets.

header.description: Must match the REVENUECAT_WEBHOOK_SECRET Worker secret.

request.description:
POST `/api/webhooks/revenuecat`. Receives RevenueCat server-to-server webhook events.

**Auth:** `Authorization: Bearer {REVENUECAT_WEBHOOK_SECRET}` — uses timing-safe comparison.

The payload must contain `event.id` and `event.type`. Duplicate events are safely skipped (idempotent).

Common event types: `INITIAL_PURCHASE`, `RENEWAL`, `CANCELLATION`, `EXPIRATION`, `NON_RENEWING_PURCHASE`.

This example simulates a coin pack purchase event.
